texto: ... the slight nausea he was feeling must be somewhat neat what God was feeling every minute of every day. If indeed He felt anything. He was, after all, a divine being, and it was entirely conceivable that divinity was incompatible with emotion. If not, then the Maestro sincerely pitied God, for hte history of mankind was nothing more than a long tale of tears. (From "Juliet" thought by The Maestro. Chapter 5)
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ann Fortier sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “... the slight nausea he was feeling must be somewhat neat what God was feeling every minute of e…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, religious, feeling, útil em momentos de reflexao.
